things.name: Mercedes-Benz Museum
things.description: Iconic nine-level museum tracing 130 years of automobile history with over 160 vehicles

things.name: Porsche Museum
things.description: Floating white museum in Zuffenhausen with 80 legendary Porsche models and a factory tour

things.name: Stuttgart State Gallery (Staatsgalerie)
things.description: One of Germany's most important art museums with Old Masters and a stellar Postmodern building

things.name: Wilhelma Zoo & Botanical Garden
things.description: Europe's only combined zoological and botanical garden in a Moorish 19th-century royal park

things.name: Killesberg Park & Tower
things.description: Beautifully landscaped park with a 40-metre observation tower and miniature railway

things.name: Stuttgart Market Hall (Markthalle)
things.description: Magnificent 1914 Art Nouveau hall packed with exotic produce, fine cheeses and Swabian delicacies

things.name: Schlossplatz & New Palace
things.description: Stuttgart's magnificent baroque central square with the Baroque New Palace and fountains

things.name: Weissenhof Estate Museum
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 1927 Bauhaus exhibition estate with Mies van der Rohe and Le Corbusier villas

things.name: Stuttgart Wine Region & Uhlbach
things.description: Stuttgart is Germany's largest wine-producing city — visit terraced vineyards and wine estates

things.name: TV Tower (Fernsehturm)
things.description: The world's first reinforced concrete TV tower (1956) with a viewing platform over the Stuttgart valley
